name: Searing Blade (Greater)
description:
This +3 greater striking Greater Flaming longsword has an ornate brass hilt and a blade shaped like stylized flames. When wielded, the blade projects illumination resembling shimmering firelight, emitting dim light in a 10-foot radius.

Activate—Shoot Fire 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect You cast the cantrip from the sword as a 9th-rank arcane spell, using your melee attack modifier with searing blade as your spell attack modifier.

Activate—Radiate Flames A (aura, concentrate, fire)

Frequency once per day

Effect A of flame radiates from the greater searing blade for 1 minute. All weapon and unarmed attacks by you and your allies within the area gain the effect of the flaming property rune.
